moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final 2026
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concludes today, July 19th, with the final match played in New York/New Jersey, marking the end of the first 48-team tournament co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: The Big Match
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The FIFA World Cup Final 2026 is LIVE today. Who lifts the trophy?

angles.name: Global Showpiece
angles.copy: After weeks of drama, the biggest World Cup ever crowns its champion today. What a tournament it's been!

angles.name: Post-match reflection
angles.copy: The dust has settled, the champions are crowned. What was your standout moment from the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today, July 19th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Claret Jug Decider
angles.copy: It's Championship Sunday at Royal Birkdale! Who will conquer the links and lift the Claret Jug at The Open today?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Drama
angles.copy: The tension is building in Southport. The 154th Open Championship is heading for a thrilling finish. Tune in!

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs India - 3rd ODI
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team faces India in the 3rd and final One Day International today, July 19th, at Lord's in London.

angles.name: Decider at Lord's
angles.copy: It's a series decider! England take on India in the 3rd ODI at Lord's today. Who's backing the Lions?

angles.name: ODI Showdown
angles.copy: The Home of Cricket hosts a huge ODI clash as England and India battle it out. Don't miss the action from Lord's!

moments.title: Bruno Mars at Wembley Stadium
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars continues his series of major stadium shows at Wembley Stadium in London, with dates this week on July 19, 22, 24, and 25.

angles.name: Wembley's 24K Magic
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is bringing the 24K Magic to Wembley Stadium again tonight and this week! Who's ready to dance?

angles.name: Still got tickets?
angles.copy: If you're heading to Wembley this week, you're in for a treat! Bruno Mars live is an experience like no other.

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Latitude Lineup
angles.copy: Counting down to Latitude! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more are heading to Suffolk from Thursday. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of music, arts, and culture! Latitude Festival kicks off this Thursday in Henham Park.

moments.title: Love Island UK Final
moments.blurb: The grand final of Love Island UK 2026 is scheduled to air on Monday, July 27th, on ITV2 and ITVX, concluding eight weeks of summer romance.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just over a week away! Who are your favourite couples to win this year?

angles.name: Last Week in the Villa
angles.copy: The drama is ramping up as we head into the final week of Love Island! What's been the biggest moment for you so far?

moments.title: Vikki Carr's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Today, July 19th, marks the 85th birthday of American traditional pop singer Vikki Carr, known for hits like 'It Must Be Him'.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Vikki Carr
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Vikki Carr today! Turn up her timeless classics with us.

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 20th, legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday. He rose to fame with his band Santana in the late 1960s.

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana tomorrow! His guitar work is truly legendary. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Kim Carnes' 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, known for her distinctive voice and the 1981 hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 on July 20th.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Kim Carnes! Her voice is instantly recognisable.

moments.title: Paul Cook's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer for punk rock pioneers the Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday tomorrow to Paul Cook, legendary drummer of the Sex Pistols! Still making noise.

moments.title: Mick MacNeil's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, keyboardist and founding member of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, turns 68 on July 20th.

angles.name: Simple Minds' Keys
angles.copy: Celebrating Mick MacNeil from Simple Minds' 68th Birthday tomorrow! His keys helped define the 80s sound.

moments.title: Stone Gossard's 60th Birthday
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Pearl Jam Power
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's Stone Gossard tomorrow! A true grunge legend.

moments.title: Vitamin C's 54th Birthday
moments.blurb: Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick, better known as pop artist Vitamin C, celebrates her 54th birthday on July 20th. She's famous for her 90s and 00s hits like 'Graduation (Friends Forever)'.

angles.name: Friends Forever
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 54th Birthday to Vitamin C tomorrow! Who remembers 'Graduation (Friends Forever)'?

moments.title: Damian Marley's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Reggae artist Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, the youngest son of Bob Marley, turns 48 on July 21st.

angles.name: Jr. Gong Celebrates
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday on Tuesday to the incredible Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley! Keep the reggae vibes flowing.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th, known for her extensive career in music, film, and fashion.

angles.name: JLo's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Thursday. What's your favourite JLo anthem?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, JLo celebrates her birthday this week! We're playing her biggest hits.

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Jagger Turns 83
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Sir Mick Jagger turns 83 on Friday! Still got those moves. Which Stones track is your favourite?

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the eternal youth of Mick Jagger this Friday! The Rolling Stones legend proves age is just a number.

moments.title: Roger Taylor's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer for rock legends Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Friday! What's your favourite Queen song?

moments.title: Darlene Love's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer and actress Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and work with Phil Spector, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Darlene's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Darlene Love this Friday! A true vocal powerhouse.

moments.title: Billie Eilish Holds UK No.1 Spot
moments.blurb: Billie Eilish's 'Birds of a Feather' retains the Official UK Singles Chart number one spot for a second consecutive week.

angles.name: Billie's Reign
angles.copy: She's done it again! Billie Eilish holds onto the UK No.1 spot for a second week with 'Birds of a Feather'. Is it your favourite?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Another week, another No.1 for Billie Eilish! 'Birds of a Feather' is dominating the Official Singles Chart.
